test_output_summary: 91 passed in 0.12s. Full suite: 560 passed, 30 warnings (pre-existing) in 0.56s. Zero failures.
implementation_notes: Created the ingestion/ package with models, error hierarchy, and comprehensive tests. Chunk and IngestResult are @dataclass (matching API contract style). SourceDocument is a Pydantic BaseModel stub (consistent with domain_config pattern, to be replaced by domain_config.models.SourceDocument when FEAT-5606 lands). Error hierarchy: IngestionError(Exception) as base, with DomainNotFoundError, GoalValidationError, DoclingError, and IndexingError as direct children. __init__.py re-exports all public API. __main__.py is a stub placeholder for TASK-ING-006. pyproject.toml updated to include ingestion in setuptools packages and pytest testpaths.
requirements_addressed: AC-002: All error classes are importable
AC-003: Chunk dataclass has text and metadata fields
AC-004: IngestResult dataclass matches API contract fields
AC-005: SourceDocument stub has file_pattern, mode, and notes fields
AC-006: Error hierarchy has correct inheritance chain
AC-008: Unit tests for model construction and error instantiation

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `ingestion/` package is importable (`from ingestion.models import Chunk, IngestResult`)
completion_promises.evidence: Created ingestion/__init__.py that re-exports all models. Tests in TestImportContracts verify `from ingestion.models import Chunk, IngestResult` and `from ingestion import Chunk, IngestResult, SourceDocument` both work. All 91 tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] All error classes are importable (`from ingestion.errors import IngestionError, ...`)
completion_promises.evidence: Created ingestion/errors.py with all 5 error classes. Tests in TestErrorImportContracts verify `from ingestion.errors import IngestionError, DomainNotFoundError, GoalValidationError, DoclingError, IndexingError` and `from ingestion import ...` both work. Also verified all 5 names are in ingestion.__all__.

Chunk is a @dataclass with `text: str` and `metadata: dict` fields. Tests verify: is_dataclass(Chunk), has 'text' field, has 'metadata' field, metadata defaults to empty dict, metadata default is distinct per instance, field count is exactly 2.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `IngestResult` dataclass matches the API contract fields
completion_promises.evidence: IngestResult is a @dataclass with exactly 5 fields matching API-ingestion.md: domain(str), collection_name(str), documents_processed(int), chunks_created(int), elapsed_seconds(float). Tests verify all 5 fields exist, field count is exactly 5, and parametrized type checks confirm each field's runtime type matches the contract.

SourceDocument is a Pydantic BaseModel with file_pattern(str, min_length=1), mode(Literal['standard','vlm']), notes(str, default=''). Tests verify all 3 fields exist, field count is 3, valid/invalid modes are accepted/rejected, empty file_pattern is rejected, notes defaults to empty string.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] Error hierarchy has correct inheritance chain
completion_promises.evidence: IngestionError inherits directly from Exception. DomainNotFoundError, GoalValidationError, DoclingError, and IndexingError each inherit directly from IngestionError. Tests in TestInheritanceChain verify: all 4 children are subclasses of IngestionError, all 5 errors are subclasses of Exception, IngestionError.__bases__ == (Exception,), and each child's __bases__ contains IngestionError. Also verified all 5 class names match errors.__all__.

ingestion/__init__.py imports and re-exports all 8 public names (Chunk, IngestResult, SourceDocument, IngestionError, DomainNotFoundError, GoalValidationError, DoclingError, IndexingError) via __all__. Tests verify all names are present in __all__ and importable from the top-level package.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] Unit tests for model construction and error instantiation
completion_promises.evidence: 91 tests across 2 test files: test_models.py (48 tests covering Chunk construction, IngestResult construction, SourceDocument validation, import contracts) and test_errors.py (43 tests covering all 5 error classes with instantiation, raise/catch, inheritance chain, and import contracts). All 91 tests pass.
